title: E-commerce Platform
summary: A full-stack e-commerce app with catalog, cart, checkout, and admin workflows.
description: Built a modern e-commerce platform with role-based admin, real-time inventory tracking, and optimized product browsing for mobile users.
problem: The client needed a faster storefront and easier product management flow.
solution: Implemented Next.js storefront, Node APIs, and optimized media delivery with CDN-based image strategy.
impact: Reduced product page load time by 42% and improved checkout completion by 18%.
seoTitle: E-commerce Platform Case Study | Durgesh Kumar
seoDescription: Case study of a fast e-commerce platform built with React, Node.js, and Tailwind CSS.

title: File Tracking System
summary: Workflow management system for tracking file movement and status.
description: Created a file tracking app to monitor file handoffs, update statuses, and reduce process delays.
problem: Manual file tracking caused delays and lost status visibility.
solution: Designed a centralized dashboard with searchable records and status updates.
impact: Improved process visibility and reduced status lookup time significantly.
seoTitle: File Tracking System Project | Durgesh Kumar
seoDescription: A file tracking system project focused on visibility, workflow, and speed.

title: Hospital Management System
summary: A hospital workflow app for patient and process management.
description: Developed a hospital management interface to organize patient records and operational tasks.
problem: Hospital processes were fragmented across manual records.
solution: Built a unified web interface for core management tasks.
impact: Improved process consistency and reduced manual coordination overhead.
seoDescription: Hospital management project focused on workflow centralization.

title: ISKCON Website
summary: Temple website with content sections and responsive UI.
description: Built a responsive informational website with clear content architecture and themed visual design.
problem: Existing web presence lacked modern UI and mobile friendliness.
solution: Redesigned the site using reusable components and responsive sections.
impact: Delivered improved mobile usability and clearer content navigation.
seoDescription: Responsive temple website project with React and Tailwind CSS.

title: KBC Quiz Game
summary: Interactive quiz game inspired by Kaun Banega Crorepati.
description: Created a browser-based quiz game with progressive levels and interactive feedback.
problem: Needed an engaging frontend project demonstrating JavaScript logic.
solution: Implemented level progression, scoring logic, and polished UI states.
impact: Showcased frontend logic and user interaction design effectively.
seoTitle: KBC Quiz Game Project | Durgesh Kumar
seoDescription: Frontend quiz game project built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
